plugins.name: autonomy-loop
plugins.description: Builder / reviewer / planner / researcher Claude Code terminals pass a git baton through a deterministic, frozen-invariant gate with an adversarial 5-lens reviewer and a per-fix bite. v0.8.0 adds a rings + provision-or-refuse security posture: a SessionStart preflight classifies a trust tier (ATTESTED -> LIVENESS -> SEPARATED -> HARDENED) and refuses unattended auto-promotion below the forge-grade tier, with a read-only control plane, a sandboxed bash tool, a repo-scoped credential, and a provisioned no-bypass prod ruleset.
